arts.ttl: Inter hoping to take top spot against Lazio
arts.sum: With Matías Vecino`s goal against Juventus, Lazio have now scored seven goals from the 90th minute onwards in this Serie A campaign: more than any other team; the Biancocelesti have ended a single season in the competition with more goals in this period of play only in 1994/95 (eight) and 2019/20 (eight). Lazio have won only two of their last nine games (D2 L5) against Inter in the Italian top-flight and have not kept a clean sheet against the Nerazzurri in Serie A since a 1-0 win in March 2019.
